_doc: Mock dispatch table. docsai proxied to the real CLI; job/folder lookups return a canned Faulted-job fixture whose Error log carries a `Method not found: 'Void UiPath.UIAutomationNext.Activities...'` message; any other uip call returns an empty array. Matching is plain substring (first match wins); the `--level Error` rule precedes the generic logs rule so the error-only view is served for that invocation.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore without aborting.
